ai.title: AI Inventory
ai.subtitle: AI-bearing cards (subtype, semantic detection or manual override), with EU AI Act risk classification and lifecycle stage
ai.skippedNoProvider: AI provider not configured — only subtype matches were classified. Configure an AI provider in Admin › Settings › AI to also catch AI hidden inside general-purpose software.
ai.empty: No AI systems detected yet. Click «Run discovery» to scan Application / ITComponent / Interface cards.

kpi.highRiskHint: EU AI Act high or unacceptable
kpi.pendingReviewHint: Missing risk class or intended purpose

linkedRisks.title: Risks on AI systems
linkedRisks.empty: No open risks currently linked to AI-bearing cards.

classifyDialog.title: Classify a card as an AI system
classifyDialog.help: Force-include the selected card in the AI Inventory. Useful for shadow-AI systems the semantic detector won't catch.
classifyDialog.scopeHint: Only Application, ITComponent and Interface cards can be classified.

principles.title: Architecture Principles
principles.empty: No active principles yet. Define them under Admin › Metamodel.

aiRequired.title: AI provider is not configured
aiRequired.body: Compliance scanning is driven by an LLM — each regulation is assessed by calling the configured AI provider against your landscape. Without a provider, scans complete instantly but every finding falls back to «AI is not configured», so we hide the scanner until it can do useful work.
aiRequired.regulations: Covered regulations: EU AI Act · GDPR · NIS2 · DORA · SOC 2 · ISO 27001.
aiRequired.contactAdmin: Ask an administrator to configure an AI provider in Admin › Settings › AI to enable Compliance scanning.

soaw.title: Statements of Architecture Work
soaw.subtitle: Scope, approach and sign-off for this initiative
soaw.empty: No SoAWs yet. Create one to capture the scope, approach and sign-off for this initiative.
soaw.confirmDelete: Delete this SoAW? This cannot be undone.
